# format: html5-dom-v1
# status: active
# include_parse_errors: true
#document
  <!doctype html>
  <html>
    <head>
    <body>
      <p>
        <b>
          "one"
      <div>
        <b>
          "two"
parse-errors:
  tree-builder: before-html-implicit-html
  tree-builder: before-head-implicit-head
  tree-builder: after-head-implicit-body
  tree-builder: in-body-block-start-tag-closes-open-p
  tree-builder: in-body-p-end-tag-implied-close-mismatch
